headline.purpose: Section titles with a branded closing dot.

shadows.name: quiet
shadows.purpose: Floating navigation and small state changes.

motion.name: desktop-scroll-stage
motion.value: 85-110svh active distance plus 8%/16% holds; services end hold 22%
motion.purpose: Measured main-page scrollytelling with readable opening and closing frames.

motion.name: mobile-chapter
motion.value: Native touch momentum plus independently observed 560-900ms content motion
motion.purpose: Responsive free scrolling with one-time settling of lines, brand dots, imagery and rows as each item enters the viewport.

motion.name: header-focus
motion.value: 320ms transition to 18px desktop / 16px mobile blur; 96px mobile gradient with safe-area coverage
motion.purpose: Separates page content from the header and status bar without extending into the following content or overloading mobile scrolling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive primary action with restrained blue hover.

components.name: Glass Header
components.description: The only persistently elevated glass surface.
components.css: .ds-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;min-height:60px;padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(24,23,22,.09);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(24,23,22,.05);font:600 14px Inter,sans-serif;color:#181716}.ds-header strong{margin-right:auto}.ds-header a{color:#6b6966;text-decoration:none}.ds-header a:hover,.ds-header a:focus-visible{color:#3060a8}.ds-header a:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #3060a8;outline-offset:4px}

narrative.overview: Die Toleo-Website wirkt wie eine präzise persönliche Unterschrift: charakteristisch, kontrolliert und unverwechselbar. Inhaltsseiten übernehmen diese Präsenz, bleiben aber lesefokussiert.
keyCharacteristics: Weißer Grund mit gezielter blau-roter Aurora
Fraunces für Überschriften, Inter für Information
Linien, Markenpunkte und Nummern statt Kartenraster

rules.name: The Two-Dot Rule
rules.body: Blau und Rot treten gemeinsam als Markenabschluss auf.

rules.name: The Visible-Content Rule
rules.body: Motion darf Inhalt unterstützen, niemals freischalten.
